title: liparis nervosa subsp. nervosa
intro: Liparis nervosa subsp. nervosa, also known as the Nerve Root or Nervosa Liparis, is a type of orchid native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and analgesic properties. The health benefits of Liparis nervosa subsp. nervosa include relief from pain, inflammation, and fever, as well as its potential to improve cognitive function and reduce stress. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and its aerial roots can be dried and used as a tea or added to herbal remedies.
